sections.paragraph:
ἀμώμητος, ον (μωμάομαι ‘blame’; Hom. et al.; Diod S 33, 7, 3; Plut., Mor. 489a; EpArist 93; Philo, Aet. M. 41; ISyriaW 2007; Sb 332; 367; PGM 13, 89; 603) blameless, unblemished, of Christians 2 Pt 3:14 (w. ἄσπιλος); Phil 2:15 v.l.—M-M. TW.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

ISyriaW ISyriaW = Inscriptions grecques et latines de la Syrie, ed. WWaddington, continuation of LWB—List 3

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 56
